caption: The video features a man dressed in a gray suit and tie, seated in front of a backdrop that prominently displays the hashtag "#BigDataSV 2015." He appears to be giving a presentation or speech, as he is gesturing with his hands while speaking. The man is positioned behind a laptop, suggesting he may be referencing notes or slides during his talk. His expressions and hand movements indicate he is engaged in explaining or emphasizing points related to the topic of big data. The setting suggests a professional conference or seminar environment focused on technology and data analysis.
